title: The Word in the Dream
summary: Post-event analysis and recurring dream imagery converge on one durable token: Yggdrasil.

narrative.newInfo: Symbolic dream content aligns with instrument-confirmed anomaly context.
narrative.dripHook: Why is myth language behaving like operational data?
narrative.payoffDelivered: Chapter 2 shock is converted into a concrete lead.
narrative.notes: Cadence: controlled drop after peak. Function: translate event into investigable symbol. Exit: Ada pivots into deliberate research.

rewardTokens.description: Yggdrasil token appears as repeatable signal, not one-off noise.
Mythic language enters the evidence pipeline.
